testsuite.name: test.SkillsTest

testcase.name: addSkills
testcase.system-out: New Skill Created with name:Skill: QA | Description: This is Quality Analyst

testcase.name: editSkill
testcase.system-out: Skill edited Skill: QA | Description: This is Quality Analyst Skill

testcase.name: deleteSkill
testcase.system-out: Skill Not Found:Skill: Not Found | Description: Not Found

testsuite.system-out: New Skill Created with name:Skill: QA | Description: This is Quality Analyst Skill edited Skill: QA | Description: This is Quality Analyst Skill Skill Not Found:Skill: Not Found | Description: Not Found
